title: Ctomche 50 Pack Disposable Dog Bowls,Disposable Bowls for Cat Puppy,Thickened Disposable Cat Feeding Bowls for Food Water, Leakproof Pet Bowls for Cats,Dishes for Puppies Parties Travel Wet Dry Food
features: Easy feeding of pets:Package include 50 pieces of disposable bowls, printed pattern, enough and sufficient quantity, meeting your daily use needs,dog food bowls measures 16.8 x 12 x 7.5 cm/ 6.61x 4.72 x 2.95 inches, can hold 25 ounces/ 3 cups of food or water, suitable for small dogs, medium dogs, cats and puppy.
Don't wash: our pet travel bowl is designed for single use, and can be thrown away directly after use, without worrying about the problem of washing dishes, convenient and time saving.

Leak Proof:The rolled rim is designed to increase rigidity and strength and prevent unwanted spills. The coated polyethylene lining makes it a leak proof disposable cups that won't get soft or wet.Suitable for dry or wet dog cat food.
Environmental quality:Made of biodegradable non-woven fibres. No Chemicals Used, No Plastic or Foam. Natural Alternative to Plastics.

Wide Range of Uses: dog camping accessories are made of paper material, not easy to deform, lightweight and leakproof, suitable for wet food and water, can be easily put into your backpack, suitable for home, pet store, long distance trip or travel, Parties.
